name: the commercial-license gate confirms the plugin's bundled content + toolchain are safe to sell commercially
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-commercial-license.sh" 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && grep -q 'violations=0' e.txt && echo commercial-safe 1>&2
